title: Fix translation keys displaying as raw text instead of translated values

requirements.summary: Update ResumeDraftDialog.tsx to wrap translation keys with t() function so they display as translated text instead of raw keys
acceptanceCriteria: The resume draft dialog displays 'Resume Your Survey' (or Hindi equivalent) instead of 'draft.resumeTitle'
The dialog message shows the translated text instead of 'draft.resumeMessage'
The translation function t() is called for all user-facing text in the dialog

file_operations.description: Import the useLanguage hook to access the t() translation function. Wrap the 'draft.resumeTitle' and 'draft.resumeMessage' translation keys with t() calls so they display translated text instead of raw key strings. Ensure all user-facing text in the AlertDialog (title, description, button labels) properly uses the t() function.

requirements.summary: Review and fix all survey wizard components where translation keys are displayed as raw text instead of calling t() to convert them to translated values
acceptanceCriteria: All user-facing text in survey components displays translated values instead of raw i18n keys
The t() function is properly imported and used for all text that should be localized
Switching between English and Hindi correctly updates all displayed text

file_operations.description: Review all text content in the welcome/consent step. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings. Check that translation keys are wrapped with t() rather than being displayed directly.

Review all text content in the phone OTP step. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all labels, placeholders, button text, and messages. Verify that translation keys are not displayed as raw text.

Review all text content in the deferred phone notice step. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all headings, descriptions, and list items. Check that translation keys are properly wrapped.

Review all text content in the basic details step including labels, placeholders, and option text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings to prevent raw translation keys from appearing.

Review all text content in the worker category step including labels, select options, and radio button text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings.

Review all text content in the work/income step including labels, placeholders, select options, and multi-select items. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings to display translated values.

Review all text content in the address/service area step including labels, placeholders, and conditional field text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings.

Review all text content in the optional identity step including labels, placeholders, file upload text, and help text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings.

Review all text content in the signature step including consent text, labels, and button text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings to prevent raw keys from displaying.

Review all text content in the additional inputs step including labels, select options, multi-select items, and radio button text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings.

Review all text content in the main survey wizard component including step navigation, buttons, and any informational text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings to display translated values instead of raw keys.

Review all text content in the progress indicator including step labels and progress text. Ensure the useLanguage hook is imported and the t() function is called for all user-facing strings to prevent translation keys from displaying as raw text.
